reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para descansar y recargar pilas para seguir viaje. Al frente de una gran plaza y lugares verdes para descansar. Ya q despues tenes largo trecho si venis del sur para llegar a trelew

(Translated by Google)
A good place to rest and recharge before continuing your journey. It's right across from a large plaza and has green spaces to relax in. Especially since you have a long way to go if you're coming from the south to get to Trelew.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnMW83emZBEAE
